creator: cheunghonyu@gmail.com
text:
fontconfig-2.9.0,1 cannot find the ftheader.h in build phase.
 
=======================<phase: build        >==========================
gmake[3]: Entering directory `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-fonts/fontconfig/work/fontconfig-2.9.0/src'
  CC     fcatomic.lo
  CC     fcblanks.lo
  CC     fccache.lo
  CC     fccfg.lo
  CC     fccharset.lo
  CC     fcdbg.lo
  CC     fcdefault.lo
  CC     fcdir.lo
  CC     fcformat.lo
  CC     fcfreetype.lo
In file included from ../fontconfig/fcfreetype.h:27,
                 from fcftint.h:26,
                 from fcfreetype.c:48:
/usr/local/include/ft2build.h:56:38: error: freetype/config/ftheader.h: No such file or directory
..
..
..
..
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-fonts/fontconfig/work/fontconfig-2.9.0'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-fonts/fontconfig.
===>  Cleaning for fontconfig-2.9.0,1

How-To-Repeat: compile x11-fonts.fontconfig after upgrading print/freetype2 to 2.4.12
